headline: The Reclusive Janitor Who Secretly Wrote the World's Longest Novel
summary: Henry Darger was a penniless, reclusive hospital janitor in Chicago. After he died in 1973, his landlord discovered he had secretly created a 15,000+ page illustrated fantasy manuscript over decades. A complete hidden life of creative genius, never shown to anyone.
keywords: outsider artist, hidden genius, secret novelist, Henry Darger, Vivian Girls, discovered art
